marketing.heroTitle: Digital moi receipts and accounts for all kinds of functions.
marketing.heroSubtitle: Simple, clear, and professional gift entry management for weddings and every type of celebration.
marketing.serviceTamil: அணைத்து விதமான விழாக்களுக்கு நாங்கள் டிஜிட்டல் முறையில் மொய் ரசீது மற்றும் கணக்கு தரப்படும்
marketing.serviceEnglish: Digital Moi receipts and accounts for all your celebrations
marketing.functionsLabel: Functions We Serve · Celebrations We Support
marketing.featuresTitleEn: Everything you need, on one platform
marketing.featuresSubtitle: Designed for busy event counters where speed, clarity, and accuracy matter.
marketing.featureOneBody: Every gift entry generates a printable receipt instantly with donor name, amount, denomination details, and typist information.
marketing.featureTwoBody: Assign multiple typists per event and keep each person's entries tracked separately.
marketing.featureThreeBody: Download consolidated or typist-wise PDF and Excel reports whenever you need them.
marketing.featureFourBody: Switch between Tamil and English with a bilingual interface and receipt output support.
marketing.howTitleEn: Four simple steps to manage your celebration gifts
marketing.stepOne: Visitors land on the public marketing page instead of the event creation screen.
marketing.stepTwo: Admins log in to create events, enter gifts, and manage settings.
marketing.stepThree: Receipts print in a cleaner format after each saved gift entry.
marketing.stepOneBody: Create your event with function type, host names, date, and venue details.
marketing.stepTwoBody: Add one or more typists for your event and manage their entries separately.
marketing.stepThreeBody: Enter donor details and amount, then print the receipt instantly at the counter.
marketing.stepFourBody: Get PDF or Excel reports anytime from the admin panel.
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Start your event today and contact us to set up your Moi tracking system.
marketing.footerTagline: Gift contribution tracking, reports, and receipt printing for live events.
marketing.footerTaglineTa: Digital Moi service for all kinds of celebrations
